{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":404},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7136892744416609038","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有人知道虎咆哮新作或者主要平台吗？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661687398,"group_id":"6938344868951362574","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"62142418579"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6938344868951362574","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.626009e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5501,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11126,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7136876131718005512","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"细节，真的很细节。作者对于这种细节的描述不止是对于主角，还有对于直播间以及国家方面的描写。不是那种套路文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1661683541,"group_id":"6938344868951362574","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人，纯新，毫无争议的新","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3GaklBgGeS1JrGGHRB9+Uw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b082240863dd4845898499f7fcf3aac9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704916&x-signature=pXsuFPIRJvORQlJXRxL%2FLLC24sY%3D","user_id":"62142418579","user_name":"王国公司保罗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"62142418579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6938344868951362574","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，苏烨出现在爆发了生化危机的平行世界，开局直接激活末世直播系统，向所有人展现‘平行世界’末世最为残酷、真实的一面。
　　同时苏烨震惊的发现，自己绑架了主世界所有人。
　　只要自己身体遭受任意伤势，身后主世界的所有人类都将实时同步这个‘伤势’。
　　至此，苏烨的每一秒就是整个蓝星所有人类的下一秒。
　　所有人都胆战心惊，生怕直播间里的那名黑发青年一不小心就‘死了’，连带着所有人都要给他陪葬。
　　在全蓝星最聪明的参谋谋划下......
　　在全蓝星最权威的专家指导下......

　　同时苏烨震惊的发现，自己绑架了主世界所有人。
　　只要自己身体遭受任意伤势，身后主世界的所有人类都将实时同步这个‘伤势’。
　　至此，苏烨的每一秒就是整个蓝星所有人类的下一秒。
